reviews.name: 김나무
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
안녕하세요! 바잇미 개사원 나무입니다!
출시하자마자 인기폭발인 [바잇미 실리콘 팟] 저 나무가 안 써볼 수 없죠!
저는 저희 누나랑 캠핑, 차박을 자주 가는데요, 그 때 마다 매번 바잇미 실리콘 보울을 썼었어요. 실리콘 보울도 가볍고 편리하지만... 입이 짧은 저는 매번 밥을 남기는데 남은 밥을 처리하지 못해 누나가 항상 곤욕이었거든요ㅠㅠ

하지만 실리콘 팟이랑 함께하게 된 이후로는 누나 눈치보지 않아도 되어서 정말 기뻐요! 먹다 남겨도 뚜껑을 덮어서 보관하면 되고, 그대로 전자레인지에 다시 돌려 먹어도 되니까요~~! 게다가 애기들 식기에도 쓰이는 무독성 실리콘이라 저도, 누나도 안심하고 쓸 수 있는 점이 가장 좋다구요! 제 픽은 옐로우인데 곧 블루도 득템할거에요!! (누나, 보고있지???) 고민은 배송을 늦출 뿐, 빨리 득템하세요!!
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Review from BITE ME Employee Namu🧡
Hello! I'm Namu, an employee at BITE ME!
The [BITE ME Silicone Pot] that became a bestseller right after launch? Of course I had to try it!
My sister and I go camping and car camping often, and we always used the BITE ME silicone bowl back then. The silicone bowl is light and convenient, but... since I'm a picky eater, I always leave food behind and my sister always had a hard time dealing with the leftovers ㅠㅠ

But ever since I started using the silicone pot, I don't have to worry about my sister anymore! If I don't finish eating, I can just put the lid on and store it, and I can even reheat it in the microwave and eat it again~~! Plus, it's made of non-toxic silicone that's also used for babies' dishes, so both my sister and I can use it with peace of mind! My pick is Yellow, but I'll be getting Blue soon!! (Sister, are you watching???) The only thing holding you back is shipping delays—get yours quickly!!

reviews.name: o****
reviews.content:
아 진짜 저 너무 감동..
저희집 강아지가 그릇을 무서워해서 고민이 진짜 많았거든요 ㅜㅜ 플라스틱이랑 도자기 그릇을 사용하고 있었는데 그릇에 담긴 것들을 못 먹고 그릇 피하고 이래서 고민이 이만저만이 아니었는데 바잇미 실리콘 그릇이 보이길래 아 이건 좀 괜찮으려나 하면서 좀 불안한 마음으로 구매했거든요.. 근데 오늘 그릇에 물이랑 사료 담아주니까 입을..얼굴을 그릇에 넣네요 ㅜㅜ 4년 같이 살면서 처음으로 그릇을 써요 저희 강아지가..진짜 너무 좋고 감동이고 바잇미 너무 고맙고 ㅜㅜ 그릇 크기도 적당하고 깊이도 적당해서 소형견이 쓰기에도 편하고 그릇 밑 부분이 생각보다 두껍고 단단해서 막 쉽게 움직이지 않아요. 그리고 제가 좋아하는 부분인데 뚜껑이 진짜 대박이에요. 저희집 강아지가 밥을 나눠서 먹을때가 많은데 다 먹을때까지 이 밖에 노출되어 있으면 위생도 그렇고 맛도 없을 것 같아서 이걸 어쩌지 라는 생각이 많이 들었는데 바잇미 팟은 그때그때 열어주고 닫아주면 돼서 진짜 편해요. 뚜껑이 헐렁한 것도 아니라서 너무 편하고 좋습니다.
나중에 다른 색도 구매하고싶어요~
reviews.content_en:
Oh I'm really touched...
My dog was scared of bowls, so I was really worried 😭 We were using plastic and ceramic bowls, but my dog wouldn't eat what was in them and just avoided the bowls, so it was such a big concern... but when I saw the BITE ME silicone bowl, I thought maybe this would work, so I bought it with a bit of anxiety.. but today when I put water and food in the bowl, my dog put their face in the bowl 😭 After 4 years together, this is the first time my dog is using a bowl.. I'm really so happy and touched and so grateful to BITE ME 😭 The bowl size is just right and the depth is perfect too, making it easy for small dogs to use, and the bottom of the bowl is thicker and sturdier than expected so it doesn't move around easily. And the part I love most is the lid—it's seriously amazing. My dog often eats meals in portions, and if it's exposed to air the whole time until it finishes, I was worried about hygiene and taste, so I was always thinking what do I do about this... but with the BITE ME pot, I can just open and close the lid as needed, so it's really convenient. The lid fits snugly without being loose, so it's really convenient and great.
I want to buy other colors later~

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
진작 살 걸 그랬어요! 
실리콘이라 얇아서 허덜거릴 줄 알았는데 엄청 두퉁해서 손으로 세게 쥐어도 안찌그러지고, 뚜껑도 얼마나 잘 맞는지 액체류 넣지 않으면 안심하고 외출할 수 있을 것 같아요!! 
제 강아지 식기 크기랑 똑같아서 거치대에 올려두고 사용하려고 샀는데 저 뚜껑이 원래 식기에도 딱 맞습니다 ㅎㅎ 
너무너무 만족해요!!
뚜껑 없는 제품도 나왔으면 좋겠어요~
reviews.content_en:
Should've bought it sooner!
I thought it would be thin since it's silicone and would wobble, but it's incredibly thick and doesn't get dented even when I squeeze it hard, and the lid fits so well that I can go out without worry as long as there are no liquids in it!!
I bought it because it's the same size as my dog's existing bowl and wanted to put it on a stand, and the lid actually fits my original bowl perfectly too hehe
I'm so so satisfied!!
I wish they'd come out with a version without the lid~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
전자렌지 이용하는 화식이나 간식  데워줄때 이용하려고 구입했는데 자꾸 요것만 손이가서 다른색으로 여러개 구입하는거 너무 이해갔어요 ㅎㅎ
조만간 다른색상도 구매예정입니다.
사이즈,디자인,뚜껑여부,편리성까지 최고!!!
reviews.content_en:
I bought this to use when reheating Japanese food or treats in the microwave, but I keep reaching for just this one and ended up buying several in different colors hehe
I plan to buy other colors soon.
Size, design, lid, convenience—everything is top-notch!!!

reviews.name: 육****
reviews.content: 타제품은 너무 비싸고 도자기는 무거워서 이제품을 구매했어요! 쿠팡에서 먼저 라벤더를 구매했는데 왠걸!! 바잇미에서 첫구매 할인도 많고 쿠폰 적립금까지 하니까 완전 반값수준으로 저렴하게 구매했어요ㅠㅠ 진작 홈페이지에서 구매할걸., 그릇도 세척도 편하고 가볍고 아이들도 밥그릇 바꿔줘도 잘 먹네요!! 담에 여유 생기면 다른 색깔도 더 사고 싶네요!!
reviews.content_en: Other products are too expensive and ceramic is heavy, so I bought this one! I first bought the Lavender color from Coupang, but then! When I bought it from the BITE ME website, there were so many first-purchase discounts and coupon savings that I got it for almost half price ㅠㅠ Should've bought from the website from the start. The bowl is easy to clean, lightweight, and the kids eat well even when I switch their food bowl!! When I have some spare money later, I want to buy other colors too!!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
늘 쓰던 제품이고 
너무 잘 쓰고 있는 제품이㉱
할인율 너무 좋고
젱여 두고 쓸려고
깔별로 주문 했어요!
렌지가능 
냉동가능
냉장가능
열탕가능 
떨어 트려도 깨질 염려 없고
앞전에 쓰던 제품보㉰ 
더 큰사이즈네여^^
여행갈때 각각 도시락 처럼 싸서 
착착 냉장고에 넣어두고 
뚜껑까지 있어서 밀폐가능하고 
여러모로 너무 쓰임새 좋은 상품😘

잘 쓸께요😍
reviews.content_en:
I'm a longtime user of this product and
I'm really happy with it😘
The discount rate is really good so
I ordered multiple colors to
keep on hand and use!
Microwave safe
Freezer safe
Fridge safe
Hot water safe
No worries about breaking even if dropped
Compared to the product I used before
It's a bigger size^^
When traveling, I pack each one like a bento box
and stack them in the fridge
With the lid for airtight sealing
It's useful in so many ways😘

I'll use it well😍

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
여행다닐때 사용하려고 주문했어요!
블루컬러랑 크림컬러로 주문했는데 컬러자체를 잘뽑아서 그런지 컬러조합고 잘 어울리고 둘이 붙여놔도 이쁘더라구요ㅎㅎ
게다가 보통 실리콘 그릇이면 내부에 코팅(?)이 안되어있는 경우가 많은데 바잇미 실리콘 팟은 코팅도 되어있고 뚜껑이 있어서 더 좋은 것 같아요~
물그릇으로도 사용할 수 있을까 걱정했었는데 받아보니 꽤 크기가 커서 여행할때에 숙소에서 물그릇으로도 사용하기 괜찮은 것 같아 만족중입니다. 여행가서 유용하게 사용할게요:)
reviews.content_en:
I ordered this to use when traveling!
I ordered in Blue and Cream colors, and the colors turned out so well that the color combination looks great and they look pretty even when placed together hehe
Plus, most silicone bowls don't have interior coating, but the BITE ME silicone pot has coating and comes with a lid so it's even better~
I was worried about whether I could use it as a water bowl, but when I received it, it's quite large so it works great as a water bowl at accommodations when traveling, so I'm satisfied. I'll use it well when traveling :)

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
바잇미 실리콘 팟 구매가 이번이 2번째인데 기존에 3가지 색상을 샀는데 너무 좋아요
장점
1.열탕소독이 되고 전자레인지 사용이 가능
2.뚱껑이 있어서 남은 음식 보관이 편리해요(화식 혹은 생식 주시는 견주분들에게 용이함)
저는 화식이랑 사료를 번갈아서 주기때문에 화식 남는거 뚱껑이 있어서 냉장고 보관하기도 좋네요.
3.소풍가거나 장거리 여행시 보관이 편리해요.
간식이나 주식 미리 준비해서 넣어가도 좋네요

단점( 이라기 보다는 바잇미에 제안)
딱히 단점은 없어요 다만 좀 아쉬운점은 크기가 좀 다양하면  좋겠어요.저희 집 강아지는 2.5키로 말티즈인데 조금 작은 사이즈가 나오면 좋겠습니다.


그리고 이번에 산건 견친구들 선물하고 제가(사람용)쓰려고 샀어요
reviews.content_en:
This is my 2nd purchase of the BITE ME Silicone Pot and I already bought 3 colors before and I love them so much
Advantages
1. Can be sterilized with hot water and is microwave safe
2. Has a lid so storing leftover food is convenient (great for dog owners who give home-cooked or raw food)
I alternate between home-cooked food and kibble, so having a lid to store leftover cooked food in the fridge is great.
3. Easy to store when going on picnics or long trips.
Great for preparing snacks or main meals in advance

Disadvantages (or more like suggestions for BITE ME)
There's no real disadvantage, but one thing I wish is that there were more size options. My dog is a 2.5kg Maltese, so I'd love a smaller size option.

And I bought this one as gifts for my dog's friends and for myself (human use) too

reviews.name: n****
reviews.content:
생각보다 더 튼튼하고 예뻐요
이번 휴가때 여행가서 정말 잘사용했어요
여행가서 구비물품 쓰기는 찝찝하고 늘 챙겨다니거나 일회용그릇에 주거나 그랬었는데 예쁜그릇에 주니까 좋아요!!! 깔별로 다 사고싶어요~
reviews.content_en:
It's sturdier and prettier than I expected
I really used it well on my vacation trip
When traveling, I felt uncomfortable using provided items, so I'd always bring my own or use disposable bowls... but serving in a pretty bowl is so nice!!! I want to buy every single color~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
이렇게 좋은 걸 왜 이제야 알았을까요 ㅠㅠ
가격도 착해🩵 밀림도 없어~ 게다가 실리콘이라 열탕 소독까지 가능하다구!!! 와 진짜 찐 잘산템 완전 만족합니다💕
reviews.content_en:
Why didn't I know about this sooner ㅠㅠ
The price is fair🩵 No sealing issues~ Plus since it's silicone, it's even sterilizable with hot water!!! Wow, this is truly a great purchase, I'm completely satisfied💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 추천받아서 구매했는데 생각보다 밑부분이 두툼하게 무게감이 있어 막 굴러다니지 않도록 잡아주고 뚜껑이 있어 먹다 남겨도 보관이 편리하네요. 애들이 그릇을 물어 뜯거나 하는 타입은 아니어서 잘 사용중이에요.
reviews.content_en: Got it on recommendation and it's better than expected! The thick, weighted bottom keeps it from rolling around easily, and the lid makes storage convenient even when there's leftover food. My pets aren't the type to chew on their bowls, so we're using it well.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
솔직히 처음에 너무 저렴해서 기대 안하고 삿는데
생각보다 너무 좋아요 !!!! 색별로 쟁여야할듯해요..
무게도 단단히 무겁고 사이즈도 소형견 밥그릇으로 해비하지않고 딱좋아요 거기다 뚜껑도있고 전자렌지도 가능이니 가격대비 짱짱인거같아요
reviews.content_en: Honestly, I didn't have high expectations because it was so cheap at first, but it's SO much better than I thought!!!! 😭 I feel like I need to get it in every color... It's nicely heavy and the size is just right for a small dog's food bowl - not too much, not too little. Plus it has a lid and is microwave-safe, so for the price it's absolutely amazing 💯

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
크림색 사고 너무 좋아서 바로 재구매했어요
색깔 별로 쟁이고 싶은 걸 꾹 참았네요
뽀득뽀득하게 세척되어서 관리도 편하고, 동결건조 사료도 퍽퍽(?) 맘 편하게 으깰 수 있어서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I bought the cream color and loved it so much I immediately reordered! 😍 I've been holding back from collecting them by color lol The cleaning is super smooth and easy to maintain, and I love that I can easily crush freeze-dried food without any fuss!

reviews.content:
생식하는 저희집에 필수필수!! 세척할때 잘닦은건가 찜찜하기도했는데 뜨거운물이용이 쉬워서 마음이 편해졌어요.
실리콘이다보니 그릇소음이 없는건 당연하구요! 생각보다 실리콘 특유의 흐물감 없이 탄탄하고 특히 바닥이 두툼하니 튼튼하고 바닥면 라운드가 좋아요!! 뚜껑도 밀착감있어서 당일 생식해동할때 그냥 그릇채로 하고 바로 주니까 너무 편해요!!  대만족중입니다 :)
reviews.content_en: It's an absolute must for our raw-feeding household!! I used to worry about whether I'd cleaned it well enough when washing, but using hot water is so easy now - puts my mind at ease 😊 Since it's silicone, there's no bowl noise of course! It's surprisingly firm without that flimsy silicone feel, and especially with the thick bottom it's really durable. Plus the rounded base is great!! The lid seals really well, so when I thaw raw food I can just pop the whole bowl in the fridge and serve it right away - so convenient!! I'm totally satisfied :)

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
물그릇을 다이소에서 산 그릇으로된걸 주다가 최근에 그릇에 까져있는걸 보고 마음이 아파서 구매하게 되었어요ㅜㅡㅜ.
다이소그릇도 자주바꿔주면 될꺼라 생각했는데, 아니었나봐요. 

이건 실리콘재질이라 열탕소독도 가능하고 뭔가 안심되요. 스텐은 연마제거가 힘들어서 최대한 안쓰거든요 ㅎㅎ

그릇은 생각보다 넓어서 저희애기가 3.5kg인데 크기가 넙대대하니 비슷하네요 ㅎㅎ 넓고 깊진않아요. 전 물그릇으로 쓰고 있는데 밥그릇으로 써도 될꺼같아요. 

아참 깊이가 깊지 않아서 사용할때 받침대하나놓고 놔줘시면
애기들이 훨씬 수월하게 먹어요~❤

귀여운사진은 많은데 사진이 4장밖에 안올라가네요 흑
reviews.content_en: I used to give my pup a regular bowl from Daiso for water, but recently I noticed it was chipped and it broke my heart 😭 I thought changing Daiso bowls frequently would be fine, but apparently not. This one is silicone so it can be sterilized with boiling water - it just feels safer, you know? I avoid stainless steel because it's hard to remove scratches from abrasive cleaning 😅 The bowl is wider than I expected. My baby is 3.5kg and the bowl is quite spacious and similar in size 😅 It's wide but not very deep. I use it as a water bowl, but I think it would work great as a food bowl too. Oh, and since it's not very deep, if you put it on a raised stand when using it, your pups will find it much easier to eat~ ❤ I have lots of cute photos but sadly only 4 uploaded 😭

reviews.name: 아****
reviews.content:
진짜 너무 예쁨...ㅠㅠ
사야지사야지하다 미뤗는데
세일하길래 고민없이바로 샀어요
짱예쁘고 실리콘이라 매트위에 둬도 밀림없고 좋아여ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so pretty... 😭😭 I kept saying I should buy it but kept putting it off, then it went on sale so I bought it without hesitation! Super pretty and since it's silicone it doesn't slip even on a mat - love it 😭

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content:
쓰고있던 그릇이 스탠이고 플라스틱 두가지 였는데
실리콘 팟으로 바꾸고 신세계를 봤네요!!
세척간편하고 너무 좋아요!!!
reviews.content_en: I was using stainless steel and plastic bowls, but switching to a silicone pot opened up a whole new world!! It's so easy to clean and amazing!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 흐물거리는 그런 실리콘 아닙니다. 진짜 넘 잘 만들었다는...뚜껑이 있어 출근할때 야채간식 싸가는데 넘 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: It's not that flimsy kind of silicone. This is really well-made... It has a lid so it's perfect for packing veggie snacks when I go to work.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 기존에 도자기 그릇을 써왔던 사람인데여 세척하고 나면 나날이 기스가 나고 무겁기도하고 깨질까 노심초사 소중히 관리하느라ㅜ 여간 불편한게 많았는데 이거 쓰고 난뒤로 세척도 편한데다 가볍고 휴대하기도 좋고 살균도 되고 위에 뚜껑도 있어서 엄청 좋더라고여 강추합니다
reviews.content_en: I used ceramic bowls before and after washing them, scratches would appear more and more, they were heavy, and I was always anxious about them breaking so I had to take care of them constantly 😭 But after using this, cleaning is easy, it's lightweight, portable, can be sanitized, and has a lid on top - it's seriously amazing! Highly recommend 👍

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
자연식을 하루에 반 봉지씩만 먹어서 
남은 양을 보관하기가 불편했는데,
실리콘팟에 보관하니 딱 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: My pup only eats half a pouch of raw food a day, so storing the leftovers was inconvenient, but keeping them in a silicone pot works perfectly!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 코코스퀘어가서 뭉크꺼 닭안심 도시락을 시켰는데 이 그릇에 나오더라구요. 보자마자 예뻐서 어디껀지 밑바닥에 확인후 집에와서 바로 주문했어요! 수재 간식들 중 렌지 돌려야 하는것들이 있는데 이 그릇은 렌지 돌려도 되서 편한거 같아요 두달뒤에 뭉크 생일인데 생일상 그릇에도 쓰려구요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered Mungk's chicken tenderloin lunchbox from Coco Square and it came in this bowl. It was so pretty the moment I saw it that I checked the bottom to find out what brand it was, came home, and ordered it right away! Some of Suji's treats need to be microwaved, but this bowl is microwave-safe so it's really convenient. Mungk's birthday is in two months and I'm planning to use this as a birthday plate too haha

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 집이 아닌 다른 곳에 갔을때 유용흐게 사용허고 있어요. 일반 휴대용 실리콘 그릇은 가벼워서 잘 움직이는데.. 약간 무게감이 있어서 너무 좋아요. 특히 전자렌지 사용도 가능하니 너무 편하네요
reviews.content_en: I'm using it really conveniently when I go places other than home. Regular portable silicone bowls are so light that they slide around easily, but this one has a nice weight to it so it doesn't move. Especially since it's microwave-safe, it's super convenient!

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content:
이거 진작 알면 좋았을텐데! 하는 아이템입니다.
놀러갈때 사료와 그릇을 따로 챙겼었는데
이건 사료 담고 뚜껑 닫고 끝! 너무 간편해서 좋더라구요.
가벼우면서 적당한 무게감으로 밀리지 않고
소음이 없으니 아이들이 부담없이 쓸 수 있어요.
reviews.content_en: I wish I'd known about this sooner! It's one of those products. I used to pack food and a bowl separately when going out, but with this you just fill it with food, close the lid, and you're done! It's so convenient. It's lightweight with just the right amount of weight so it doesn't slide, and there's no noise so the kids can use it without any hassle.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지 용품을 하도 사서..엄마가 캔디거 뭘 사기만해도 좀 뭐라하시는데 이 밥그릇은 정말 잘 샀다고 하시네여. 세척도 간편하고. 무엇보다 전자렌지에 돌릴수있어서 설거지가 줄어요. 화식이나 특별식 주는날에는 이거 뚜껑닫고 사용하면 진짜 금방입니다. 그리고 다른색이 다 품절이라.........블루삿는데....블루가 제일 예븐거같네여..ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I've bought so many dog products that my mom complains whenever I buy anything, but she said I really made a great choice with this food bowl. It's easy to clean too. Most importantly, since you can microwave it, you save on dishes. On days when I give them special food or treats, I just close the lid on this and it's done in no time. And all the other colors are out of stock... so I got blue... but blue looks the prettiest anyway lol

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 이미 노랑색이랑 그린색 사고 만족해서 나머지 색상들 추가로 구매 했어요
reviews.content_en: I already bought yellow and green and was so satisfied that I bought the rest of the colors too

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content: 오둥이 맘마 타임♡
reviews.content_en: Odoongi's mealtime ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이렇게 좋은걸 왜 이제서야 내주신거에요 ㅋㅋㅋ 밥줄때마다 빨리 안먹어서 파리랑 날파리들이 엄청 꼬엿엇는데ㅠㅠ 뚜껑잇으니깐 덮엇다 열엇다 해줄수잇어서 좋아요! 위생적이에요~~ 색깔도 너뮤 귀여워요ㅠㅠ 저는 실리콘재질을 짱 좋아해사 바잇미에 실리콘 밥그릇 물컵이런것도 다 삿어요ㅠㅠ 이건 진짜 효자템이에요!
reviews.content_en: Why are you just giving me something this good now lol Every time I fed them, they'd eat so slowly that flies and gnats would swarm everywhere ㅠㅠ But now with the lid, I can cover and uncover it, which is great! It's hygienic~~ The colors are so cute too ㅠㅠ I absolutely love silicone materials so I bought all kinds of BITE ME silicone food bowls and water cups ㅠㅠ This is a real lifesaver!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
여행갈때마다 집에서 쓰던 그릇 챙겨다니면서 행여라도 깨질까 조심히 넣어다녔었는데 앞으로 여행갈때 쓰려고 구매했어요! 실리콘팟 겉은 무광느낌인데, 안쪽은 매끈매끈 유광느낌의 맨들거림이라 사용하기 더 편할거같구요 
뚜껑도 팟애 딱맞게 닫을수있어서 밀폐도 잘될거같더라구요
reviews.content_en: Every time I traveled, I'd carefully carry the bowl I use at home, worried it might break. But I bought this for future trips! The silicone pot has a matte finish on the outside, but the inside is smooth and glossy, which will make it even easier to use. The lid also closes perfectly on the pot so it should seal really well

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 색감 너~~무 이뻐요!! 색이 다 이뻐서 진짜 고민했는데 라벤더 강추예요 ㅠㅠ 색감 맛집..👍 저는 깔 별로 모을것 같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ  요 팟에다가 밥 줄 때 마다 기분 좋아져요! 실리콘 재질인데 흐물거리지 않고 탄탄하고 퀄리티도 좋구 전자렌지도 사용가능해서 특식 줄 때도 이용하기 편 할 거 같아요 ~!
reviews.content_en: The colors are SO pretty!! All the colors are so beautiful that I really had trouble choosing, but I highly recommend lavender ㅠㅠ This is the place for colors..👍 I think I'll end up collecting all the colors lol Every time I put food in this bowl, I feel happy! It's silicone material but it doesn't feel flimsy—it's sturdy with great quality and it's microwave-safe so it'll be convenient for special meals too~!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 예뻐요 색깔이 예쁘니 밥을 담아도 느낌있어요ㅎㅎ 안에 코팅되어있어서 세척도 매우 간편합니다!
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty—the colors are beautiful so even when you put food in it, it looks nice hehe The inside is coated so it's very easy to clean!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미 그릇은 종류별로 다있어요💜💛💙 여행갈때 물그릇 밥그릇 애기밥 넣을수있는 실리콘팟 까지 전부다 색감도 이쁘고 가볍고 물세척도 잘되고~ 디자인은 두말하면 잔소리죵 ㅎㅎ 덕분에 놀러갈때 맘이 편할거같아용
reviews.content_en: BITE ME bowls come in different varieties! 💜💛💙 I have everything from water bowls and food bowls to silicone pots for the puppy's food when traveling. The colors are so pretty, they're lightweight, and they wash really well~ The design is beyond words 😄 I feel so much more at ease when we go out thanks to these!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 실리콘이지만 그렇다고 내구성이 없진않아요 적당히 단단하고 좋네요 유리그릇쓰다가 식기도 좀 안전한걸로 바꾸고 싶었는데 이게 딱인것 같아요 여행갈때도 뚜껑이 있어서 들고다니기 편할것같구 맘에 쏙 듭니다
reviews.content_en: Even though it's silicone, it's not lacking in durability at all. It's nicely sturdy and perfect! I wanted to switch from glass bowls to something safer, and this seems like just the right fit. It has a lid so it'll be convenient to take on trips, and I'm really happy with it!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 핑크랑 그린을 주문했는데용~ 파스텔느낌이라 질리지않을 것 같아요! 그리고 실리콘이라 마음 편히 사용할 것 같습니다. 깊이가 어느정도 있는 용기라서 물그릇 우유그릇 하기 좋고! 식사를 주는 용도도 좋지만 가끔 식사나 물이 남아있는경우에 먼지가 들어갈 수 있어서 외출시간에는 뚜껑을 덮어둘 수 있어서 좋은 것 같아요! 뚜껑이 없었다면 굳이 필요하진 않을 수 있거든요.. 뚜껑때문에 구매했거든요~ 워낙 좋은 제품들을 바잇미에서 핀매중이라 이전에 다 구매해놨었어요 근데 캠핑다니거나 외출시 먼지나 혹시 모를 벌레들이 들어갈까봐 늘 다른 걸로 덮어놨었는데 이건 그럴 불필요한 걱정을 안해서 일단 너무 만족합니다~^^ 그리고 포장이 워낙 견고하고 깔끔하게 되어있어서 선물로도 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: I ordered the pink and green~! They have such a nice pastel feel that I don't think I'll get tired of them! And being silicone, I feel comfortable using them. The container has good depth so it's great for water bowls, milk bowls, and more! It's good for serving meals, but sometimes if food or water is left in it, dust can get in, so I really like that I can put the lid on when we're going out! If there was no lid, it might not have been necessary to buy... honestly I bought it for the lid~ Since BITE ME always has such great products on sale, I'd already bought everything before. But when camping or going out, I was always covering it with something else because I was worried about dust or bugs getting in. With this, I don't have to worry about that anymore, so I'm really satisfied!^^ Plus, the packaging is so sturdy and neat that it would make a great gift!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
식기 새로 바꿔주려고 구매했어요
가격도 착하고 디자인도 너무 이뻐요
색상이 넘 귀여워서 깔별로 갖고싶네요ㅎㅎ
밥 담아주면 너무 귀여울거같아요
실리콘이라서 흐물렁 거릴까봐 걱정했는데
생각보다 단단하고 무게감 적당히 있는 식기라서
너무 좋아요 뚜껑도 활용도가 높아서 좋을거같아요
밥 담으면 졸귀탱이에요...으헝헝 월급받고 또 사러와야징
reviews.content_en:
I bought this to replace my pet's dishes
The price is great and the design is so pretty
The colors are so adorable that I want to get each one 😄
I think it'll look so cute with food in it
I was worried it might feel flimsy since it's silicone
But it's sturdier than I expected and has a nice weight to it
I really love it and the lid seems really useful too
When filled with food it's absolutely precious... *melts* I'll have to come back and buy more when I get paid!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
올해 6살 비숑 키우고 있어요
함께 동반여행을 많이가는데 놀러가면 맛있는거 먹는지 아나봐요~ㅎㅎ 사료를 잘 안먹어서 가끔 테린을 주문해서 섞어주는데 그래서 테린때문에 렌지 돌릴일이 많아지더라구요
야외나 놀러갈때 가져가는 그릇은 깨질까봐
플라스틱 위주로 가지고 다니다 보니 그릇자체가 렌지 불가한 경우가 많았는데 안심하고 쓸 수 있어 좋아요
또 설거지를 바로 할 수 없는 야외도 다니다 보니 깨끗하지 않은 그릇 보관도 불편했는데 뚜껑이 있어서 편합니다
아주 만족스러워요
reviews.content_en:
I have a 6-year-old Bichon this year
We travel together a lot, and when we go out, who knows if she's enjoying the good food~ 😄 Since she doesn't eat her regular kibble well, I sometimes order terrine to mix in, which means I end up using the microwave a lot more
For bowls I take on outdoor trips or when traveling, I was mainly using plastic because I was worried about breaking
So a lot of them weren't microwave-safe, but I'm happy I can use this one with confidence
Also, since I'm outdoors where I can't wash dishes right away, it was inconvenient to store dirty bowls, but the lid makes it so much easier
I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
미니팟 사고 너무 맘에 들어서 하나 더 살까 고민하던 중 특가하길래 잽싸게 겟또💖
냉동 닭가슴살 특식으로 종종 주는데 항상 도자기 그릇에 뚜껑없이 돌려주다보니 수분 다 날라가서 퍽퍽해지고 도자기는 뜨거워지고 했거든요 
근데 이거사고 촉촉한 닭찌찌로 주게 되어 서로 만족도 업됐슴니당
내부 코팅되어 있어서 이염도 잘 안되고 세척 잘되고 매우 만족👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
I loved the mini pot so much I was thinking about buying another one, and when it went on sale I quickly grabbed it 💖
I often give frozen chicken breast as a special treat, and I always used to microwave it in a ceramic bowl without a lid, which meant all the moisture would evaporate and it would get dry and the ceramic would get really hot
But after getting this, I serve it as moist chicken and we're both much happier
The interior is coated so it doesn't stain easily, cleans well, and I'm very satisfied 👍🏻

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
너무 크거나 안 맞을까봐 세일할 때 노랑이만 샀는데 후회중입니다 ㅜㅜ 깔별로 다 쟁일 예정이니 할인 좀 해주세요ㅠㅠ
실리콘이라 안심할 수 있고 전자렌지 돌리기에 뚜껑이 있어 좋고 튼튼하고 크기고 딱 적당합니다! 저는 도자기보다 오히려 이제품이 더 좋은 것 같아요. 다음 세일 때 일단 파랑 연두는 무조건 살건데 보라 핑크도 이쁘네요 ㅋㅋ 개르신도 거부감없이 완밥하셨습니다.
reviews.content_en:
I was worried it might be too big or not fit right, so I only bought yellow on sale and now I regret it 😭 I'm planning to get all the colors so please give us some discount 😢
Since it's silicone I feel safe, it has a lid which is great for microwaving, it's sturdy, and the size is just right! Honestly I think this product is better than ceramic bowls now. Next sale I'm definitely getting blue and light green, and purple and pink are pretty too 😄 My pup ate every last bite without any hesitation!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우왕 색감이 견주 맘에 쏙 드는데요! 색감도 이쁘고 받자마자 알려주신 세척법으로 새척햇더니 안심되네요! 무엇보다 뚜껑 닫아서 보관도 되니까 여행 갈때라던지 유용하게 쓸 수 있으니 그 점이 정말 메리트인거 같아요🥰 저렴한 가격에 두 개 득템했습니당🖤
reviews.content_en: Wow, the colors are just what my dog loves! The colors are so pretty and right after I got it, I washed it with the cleaning method you recommended and felt so reassured! Most importantly, I can store it by closing the lid so it's super useful for trips and such, which feels like a real advantage 🥰 I got two of them at this affordable price 🖤

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 원래 이 브랜드 제품 좋아하는데 이번에 저렴한 가격에 좋은 제품을 구매할 기회가 생겨서 완전 득템한거 같아요.가끔씩 이런 이벤트도 너무 좋은듯해요.항상 아이들을위해 좋은 제품 만들어주셔서 감사합니다.참고로 실리콘 소재 특성상 약간 흐물거림이나 흠집 같은게 있을수도 있는데 전혀 그렇지않고 디자인 내구성도 너무 좋았습니다.살까 말까 고민하는분들도 계실텐데 아마 제품 받아보시면 만족하실거예요.
reviews.content_en: I already love this brand's products, and this time I got a great opportunity to buy quality products at a cheap price, so it was a total win! I really love these kinds of events too. Thank you for always making great products for our pups. By the way, due to silicone's material properties, there might be slight softness or scratches, but there's none of that at all, and both the design and durability are excellent. Some people might be on the fence about buying, but I'm sure you'll be satisfied once you receive the product.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
라벤더 색상 너무 예쁜 실리콘 팟
깨끗하고 예쁜 그릇입니다!
강아지 고구마 케잌 만들 때 사용해봤어요~
간식 그릇으로 샀는데 사이즈가 넉넉하네요
작은 사이즈도 추가 구입해야겠네요
reviews.content_en:
Such a pretty lavender-colored silicone pot!
It's a clean and beautiful bowl!
I tried using it when making homemade sweet potato cake treats for my dog~
I bought it as a snack bowl but the size is really generous
I need to get a smaller size too!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 여행갈때 들고가려고 샀는데 퀄리티 되게 좋아요 얇은거 아니고 두툼한 실리콘이고 야무지게? 생겼음 중형견인데 밥그릇으로 쓰기 딱이에요 전자렌지 사용 가능한것도 좋고 마음에 들어요 너무 예쁨
reviews.content_en: I bought this for trips and the quality is really great! It's not thin—it's thick silicone and looks sturdy. Perfect size for a medium-sized dog's food bowl. It's nice that it's microwave-safe too. Love it, and it's so pretty! 🐕

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 놀러갈 때 밥 먹일 그릇이 필요해서 구매했어요! 잃어버려서 다시 구매..실리콘팟 그릇은 진짜 색상고민하게 하네요,, 옐로우 그린 블루 라벤더 고민하다 옐로우 그린품절 이슈로 블루로 구매했어요:) (품절 오히려 조하..)
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I needed a bowl to feed my dog when traveling! I lost it and bought it again.. The silicone pot really makes you agonize over color choices,, I was torn between yellow, green, blue, and lavender, but ended up going with blue because yellow and green were out of stock :) (honestly kind of glad they were out of stock..)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이제 애들 급여를 자연식으로 바꿔주고 있는데 간혹 밥을 안 먹을 때가 있어서 난감했는데 뚜껑이 있어서 안 먹을 때도 덮어서 보관할 수 있어서 좋은 것 같아요!
넓기도 하고 밑에 받침이 있어서 높이를 맞춰줄 수 있으면 더 좋을 것도 같아요
reviews.content_en: I'm switching my kids to a raw food diet now, and sometimes they don't want to eat, which was frustrating. But having the lid is great because I can just cover it and store it when they're not eating! It's also nice and spacious. Though it would be even better if there were legs underneath to adjust the height.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
집에 그릇이 많아서 눈여겨만 보다가 세일하길래 사봤는데 괜찮은듯요^^
여행,캠핑갈때 가져가면 좋을것같아요!
뚜껑있어서 좋고 생각보다 탄탄하네요~
소형견이 쓰기엔 사쥬가 살짝 큰거같은데...
좀 더 작은 사쥬 나오면 더 좋을것같아요
reviews.content_en: I had a lot of bowls at home and was just eyeing this, but bought it when it went on sale and it seems great ^^ I think it would be good to bring when traveling or camping! The lid is nice and it's sturdier than expected~ The size seems a bit big for small dogs though... I'd love it if they made a smaller size!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 화식이랑 동결 병행하면서 전자렌지에도 사용 가능하고, 뜨거운 물을 부어도 환경호르몬 걱정없는 용기가 필요했어요. 뚜껑도 느슨하지 않고 잘 닫혀서 여행갈 때 들고 다니기에도 좋을 것 같아요! ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I needed a container that could handle both raw and frozen food while also being microwave-safe and not releasing environmental hormones when hot water is poured in. The lid closes snugly without being loose, which makes it perfect for taking on trips! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
여러번 망설이다라 이번에 구입했어요. 
다른 실리콘 용기와 달리 처음부터 냄새도 없고, 뚜껑도 밀착력이 좋아서 퀄리티가 좋은 제품인 걸 알겠더라구요. 
강아지 유치원에서 캠프 했는데 아침 도시락 챙겨 보냈어요. 

다음에 좀 더 작은 사이즈도 나오면 너무너무너무 좋겠습니다 ^^ 3kg 강아지 한끼용으론 좀 커요
reviews.content_en: I hesitated a few times before finally buying it. Unlike other silicone containers, it has no smell from the start, and the lid has great seal strength—you can tell it's a quality product. My dog went to puppy kindergarten camp and I packed it as a lunch box in the morning. I'd absolutely love it if they made a smaller size next time ^^ It's a bit big for my 3kg dog's single meal.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
실리콘 팟 색이 예뻐서 고민하다 지른 라벤더, 큼직해서 좋고 습식먹는
강아지에게 딱! 너무 예뻐서 한 마리뿐인데 다른 색도 모으고싶네요 🙄💜
reviews.content_en: I agonized over the pretty silicone pot color and went with lavender—it's nice and spacious, perfect for my dog who eats wet food! It's so pretty I want to collect other colors even though I only have one dog 🙄💜

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
뚜껑도 있고 리뷰가 좋아서 샀는데 
다른색상도 사고싶을 만큼 튼튼하고 좋아요~ 
다만 2kg이하 치와와를 키우고 있어 조금 작은사이즈도 있으면 좋을것 같은 아쉬움이 있어요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it has a lid and great reviews, and it's sturdy and great enough that I want to buy other colors~ But I have a chihuahua under 2kg, so I wish there was a smaller size available ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이번에 사료 바꾸면서 구매했어요 ! 
라벤더색 색감 최고 ❤️
실리콘이라서 열탕도 가능하고 후기가 많은데에는 이유가 있었네요〰️ 펜션 놀러갈때 뚜껑이 있어서 사료 넣어가면 좋을 것 같아용
reviews.content_en: I bought this when switching to a new food! The lavender color is the best ❤️ Since it's silicone, it can handle boiling water and there are many reviews for a reason~ When we go to vacation rentals, having the lid makes it easy to bring food 😊

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
먹다 남기는일이 많아서 뚜껑있는  그릇이 필요했는데
너무 좋습니다. 적당한 무게감으로 그릇이 밀려 돌아다닐일도 없고,  재질도 좋고, 세척도 수월합니다.
색상도 파스텔톤 이쁜색이라 밥을 주면서도 기분이 좋네요.
reviews.content_en: My dog leaves a lot of food uneaten, so I needed a bowl with a lid and it's perfect. The weight is just right so the bowl doesn't slide around, the material is great, and it's easy to clean. The color is a pretty pastel tone too, so it feels nice even while feeding 🐕
